title: Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere
summary:
Kick off work in VS Code or the CLI, finish it from your phone. Remote control for GitHub Copilot sessions is now generally available on github.com and GitHub Mobile.

The post Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

processed.summary:
- GitHub introduces **cross-platform session persistence** for Copilot, enabling developers to maintain conversation context across VS Code, CLI, web, and mobile.
- The architecture leverages a **centralized state management** system that synchronizes chat history and metadata between local development environments and GitHub’s cloud infrastructure.
- This update facilitates a **continuous developer workflow**, reducing context switching costs and allowing for asynchronous AI-assisted coding tasks.
- Integration with **GitHub Mobile** provides a remote control layer for managing local coding sessions while away from the primary workstation.
key_results: General availability of Copilot session synchronization across all GitHub platforms.
Seamless transition of active AI chat threads from CLI/VS Code to mobile/web.
Centralized history tracking for Copilot interactions regardless of client type.
Enhanced accessibility for AI-assisted code review and debugging on mobile devices.
Reduction in manual re-prompting when switching between hardware or environments.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: GitHub launches cross-platform Copilot session persistence to enable seamless AI-assisted development across VS Code, web, and mobile interfaces.

title: Aderant transforms cloud operations with Amazon Quick
summary: In this post, we share how Aderant used the AI-powered capabilities of Amazon Quick to unify search across six vendor systems and automate documentation workflows, achieving 90 percent faster search times and 75 percent documentation acceleration, and how others can apply these approaches to their operations.

processed.summary:
- Implemented a **unified search architecture** across six disparate vendor systems using AI-powered capabilities to break down data silos.
- Automated **documentation workflows** to streamline cloud operations and reduce manual content generation time.
- Utilized **Generative AI** for cross-platform information retrieval, effectively acting as an enterprise-grade **RAG** (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) solution.
- Focused on **operational efficiency** by integrating disparate metadata into a single queryable interface.
key_results: 90% reduction in search time across internal systems
75% acceleration in technical documentation workflows
Consolidation of search functionality for 6 different vendor platforms
Automation of manual documentation processes via AI
Successful deployment of AI-driven cloud operations tools
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: Aderant leverages Amazon Quick to unify multi-vendor search and automate documentation, achieving 90 percent faster information retrieval.

title: Integrate Atlassian Confluence Cloud with Amazon Quick
summary: In this post, you will learn how to set up the Confluence Cloud integration with Quick. This includes creating a knowledge base for semantic search, setting up Actions to query and manage Confluence pages, and organizing resources in Quick Spaces. Quick integrates with your current enterprise technology stack, from internal knowledge repositories and corporate intranets to business-critical applications and AWS data services.

processed.summary:
- Integrates Confluence Cloud as a primary data source for **Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)** within the Quick ecosystem.
- Employs **AI Actions** to enable LLM-based agents to perform bi-directional tasks such as querying and updating documentation.
- Organizes enterprise-level resources through **Quick Spaces** to unify internal knowledge across diverse technology stacks and data services.
key_results: Seamless creation of semantic search knowledge bases
Automated management of Confluence pages via natural language
Enhanced data organization through dedicated Quick Spaces
Cross-platform integration with corporate intranets and AWS services
Streamlined discovery of internal business-critical information
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: Amazon introduces Confluence Cloud integration for Quick to enable enterprise semantic search and automated document management.

title: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at Dell Technologies World: ‘Demand Is Going Parabolic, Utterly Parabolic’

Agent sandboxes run 50% faster on NVIDIA Vera than traditional CPUs — while enterprise data queries are up to 3x faster with the Vera CPU. And 5,000 enterprises like Lilly, Samsung and Honeywell are running AI workloads on Dell AI Factories […]

* Specialized **Vera CPUs** are optimized for **agent sandboxes** and enterprise data queries, providing a hardware-level acceleration for complex reasoning tasks.
* Integration with **Dell AI Factories** enables large-scale **Generative AI** workloads across diverse industries, focusing on high-throughput and low-latency inference pipelines.
key_results: Agentic AI inference achieved at 1/10th the cost per token using Vera Rubin NVL72.
Agent sandboxes run 50% faster on NVIDIA Vera hardware compared to traditional CPUs.
Enterprise data query performance increased by up to 3x with the Vera CPU.

title: Pentagon walks away from Canada-U.S. defence board

processed.summary:
• The **U.S. Pentagon** has reportedly withdrawn from the **Permanent Joint Board on Defence (PJBD)**, a bilateral advisory body with Canada established in 1940.
• This move signifies a major shift in the **strategic defense architecture** between the two nations, potentially altering long-term cooperation on continental security.
• The withdrawal impacts **bilateral military coordination** and suggests a pivot toward more unilateral defense policy decisions under the current administration.
key_results: Termination of U.S. participation in the historic PJBD advisory body.
Potential disruption to long-standing North American security frameworks.
Shift in bilateral defense communication channels between Washington and Ottawa.
Impact on integrated continental defense planning beyond NORAD.
Signaling of a new era of geopolitical prioritization in U.S. military policy.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: The Pentagon withdraws from the U.S.-Canada defense board, signaling a major shift in North American military cooperation.

title: Justice Department announces a $1.7B fund to compensate Trump allies

processed.summary:
- The **Justice Department** has announced a **$1.7 billion settlement fund** to resolve litigation stemming from the unauthorized disclosure of private tax records.
- The legal action follows a significant **data breach** where an IRS contractor leaked financial information of thousands of individuals, including prominent political figures.
- The settlement reflects the severe **legal and financial liability** associated with failures in **data governance** and internal access controls within government systems.
- From a systems perspective, this highlights the catastrophic impact of **insider threats** and the necessity for zero-trust architecture in sensitive data environments.
key_results: $1.7 billion allocated for compensation fund.
Resolution of a long-standing class-action lawsuit.
Identification of major security gaps in IRS data handling.
Compensation eligibility for thousands of individuals.
Establishment of a legal precedent for government data leaks.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: The Justice Department announces a $1.7 billion settlement fund to compensate victims of unauthorized IRS tax record leaks.

title: 1024000^2 Blocks, 2B2T Minecraft Server World Download Project, and Discoveries

processed.summary:
- The **2b2t Archive Project** released a massive world download covering a 1,024,000 by 1,024,000 block area of the world's oldest Minecraft anarchy server.
- The technical implementation utilized **distributed data scraping** and custom chunk-loading clients to bypass server-side rate limits and anti-cheat mechanisms.
- The project provides a unique dataset for **spatial data analysis** and potential world-modeling, documenting over a decade of emergent, unmoderated player-driven structures.
key_results: Successful extraction and archiving of 1,048,576,000,000 blocks of world data.
Development of optimized storage formats to handle terabyte-scale Minecraft world files.
Mapping of historically significant player-built bases and 'digital ruins' from 2010 to present.
Implementation of stealth mapping agents to avoid server bans during the data collection process.
Public release of a high-resolution coordinate database for architectural discovery.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: 2b2t Archive Project releases a massive 1-million-block Minecraft world dataset, preserving over a decade of emergent player-driven digital history.

title: Show HN: Files.md – Open-source alternative to Obsidian

processed.summary:
- **Files.md** introduces a lightweight, open-source Markdown editor designed to serve as a high-performance alternative to **Obsidian** for local knowledge management.
- The architecture prioritizes a **local-first** approach, operating directly on the user's file system without intermediate databases or proprietary metadata layers.
- Designed for **interoperability**, the tool's reliance on standard Markdown makes it an ideal interface for **RAG-based workflows** and LLM agent document manipulation.
- The project emphasizes **minimalism and speed**, catering to developers who require a zero-config environment for technical documentation and knowledge graphs.
key_results: High-performance rendering of large Markdown repositories.
Zero-configuration setup by pointing directly to local directories.
Full data ownership through a local-first storage model.
Simplified UI focusing on document hierarchy and search speed.
Native support for standard Markdown syntax ensuring portable data.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: Zakirullin launches Files.md, an open-source Markdown editor offering a lightweight, local-first alternative to Obsidian for seamless document management.

title: Show HN: Auto-identity-remove – Automated data broker opt-out runner for macOS

processed.summary:
- **Auto-identity-remove** is a specialized macOS utility designed to automate the programmatic submission of opt-out requests to various data brokers.
- The system acts as a **local automation agent**, navigating diverse web interfaces to submit PII (Personally Identifiable Information) removal forms without relying on third-party cloud services.
- The architecture focuses on **privacy-preserving automation**, ensuring that sensitive identity data remains on the local machine while performing complex web-based interactions.
key_results: Automates data removal requests across multiple broker platforms.
Eliminates the need for paid, third-party data deletion services.
Maintains data sovereignty by executing all automation scripts locally on macOS.
Provides a community-extensible framework for adding new broker targets.
Reduces the manual friction associated with privacy management and digital footprint reduction.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: Stephen Thorn launches a macOS tool that automates complex data broker opt-out workflows to improve personal privacy locally.

title: Japan Team Successfully Test Engine for Mach 5 Aircraft, Eyeing 2HR Trip to US

processed.summary:
- The project involves a **hypersonic engine architecture** designed to sustain speeds exceeding Mach 5 for commercial aviation.
- A critical component of the design is the **pre-cooling system**, which prevents engine meltdown by cooling incoming air before it reaches the core.
- The architecture seeks to solve the transition between **subsonic and hypersonic propulsion**, a major hurdle in dual-mode engine design.
- If successful, the impact would be a paradigm shift in global logistics, enabling **two-hour trans-Pacific flights**.
key_results: Successful ground-based test of the Mach 5 engine prototype
Validation of the liquid hydrogen-based pre-cooling mechanism
Demonstration of stable combustion at simulated high-velocity airflows
Structural integrity verification under extreme thermal and aerodynamic stress
Proof of concept for a propulsion system capable of sustained hypersonic flight
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: A Japanese research team successfully tests a Mach 5 engine prototype to enable two-hour trans-Pacific hypersonic flights.

title: XS: A programming language. Anywhere, anytime, by anyone

title: Raising the bar: Quality, shared responsibility, and the future of GitHub’s bug bounty program
summary:
We're updating our bug bounty program standards to prioritize quality submissions, clarify shared responsibility boundaries, and evolve how we reward low-risk findings.

The post Raising the bar: Quality, shared responsibility, and the future of GitHub’s bug bounty program appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

processed.summary:
- GitHub is **updating bug bounty standards** to prioritize submission quality, aiming to reduce noise and focus on actionable security insights rather than volume.
- The program introduces **shared responsibility boundaries**, clarifying how security risks are handled across GitHub’s infrastructure versus third-party integrations and user-controlled environments.
- GitHub is **evolving reward structures** for low-risk findings, shifting financial incentives toward the discovery of critical, high-impact vulnerabilities that affect platform integrity.
key_results: Implementation of stricter submission quality requirements for researchers.
Definition of new boundaries for shared responsibility in the GitHub ecosystem.
Adjustment of bounty payouts for low-risk and informational findings.
Focus on reducing triage overhead for non-critical security reports.
Strategic shift towards incentivizing high-severity vulnerability research.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: GitHub updates its bug bounty program standards to emphasize submission quality and clarify security responsibility boundaries for researchers.
